summary: Frontend-only testing of newly rewritten Home.js and ParisAirportTransfer.js pages. Tested mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports for mobile-first design. All 15 features tested successfully.

details: Booking form ABOVE THE FOLD (y=481px < 844px viewport)
Sticky BOOK NOW button visible at bottom (y=767px)
Trust stats grid: 50K+ trips, 120+ cities, 24/7 service, 4.9/5 rating
Desktop layout correct: Trust LEFT (x=320px), Booking RIGHT (x=984px)
Mobile sticky CTA correctly hidden on desktop
4 trust badges visible: Secure Payment, Meet & Greet, Flight Tracking, Fixed Prices
Payment icons: Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay
6 city links found: Paris CDG (65€), Nice (35€), Barcelona (39€), Rome (40€), Berlin (45€), Monaco (65€)
All testids working: popular-dest-0 through popular-dest-5
Each card has professional photos from Unsplash
3 reviews visible: Sarah M. (London), Jean-Pierre D. (Paris), Marco R. (Milan)
Clicking scrolls to booking form (scroll position changes from 2300 to 254)
Form accepts pickup, dropoff, date, time inputs
Language dropdown accessible via globe icon button
Content changes to French: 'Transfert Aeroport Premium'
Popular destinations labels change to French (e.g., 'Des 65€')
Hero title: 'Paris Airport Transfer - CDG, Orly & Beauvais'
Sticky BOOK NOW button visible at bottom (y=767px)
4 vehicle cards found with photos from Unsplash
Premium Sedan (65€), Luxury Sedan (95€), Minivan (130€), Minibus (190€)
Each card has BOOK NOW button that scrolls to form
Vehicle BOOK NOW button stays on same page (no navigation)
Selected vehicle banner appears after clicking
Banner shows: vehicle name, passengers, price
Page loads correctly with city-transfer-page testid
Hero title: 'CDG Airport Transfer - Charles de Gaulle Private Car'

seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page and Paris transfer page successfully converted to mobile-first design. All testids working: home-page, home-hero-title, home-booking-card, home-booking-form, home-submit-btn, home-mobile-sticky-cta, home-trust-badge, popular-dest-0-5, view-all-destinations, cta-book-btn. Paris page uses CityTransferPage component with testids: city-transfer-page, city-hero-title, booking-form-card, booking-form, submit-booking-btn, vehicle-card-1-4, book-vehicle-1-4, selected-vehicle-banner, mobile-sticky-cta, trust-badge-top, view-all-cities-btn, route-0-3. Language switcher works via globe icon button. CDG page confirmed working with same mobile design.

Home desktop: trust badges left, booking form right
Home: popular destinations grid with 6 cities
Home: trust badges (50K+ trips, payment icons, reviews)
